name: Hackthon-Victorian Integrated Survey of Travel and Activity (VISTA) - Mode Choice Behaviour Prediction
desc:
Developed the final model optimisation and submission pipeline, combining CatBoost and LightGBM predictions via weighted
ensembling to minimise cross-entropy loss.
Implemented probability calibration and model blending to improve prediction stability across the test dataset.
Coordinated final model evaluation and submission strategy, leading the team to 1st place on the competition leaderboard
